name: precision: a markdown outcome table in the reply is not a set of work-claims
note: VERBATIM from a real captured turn (session 9415549c, t2). The agent pasted the README outcome table into chat. Every row parses as a 'claim' with a literal target and zero evidence, so each becomes a phantom. None of these are work the agent claimed to have done this turn — they are documentation. This is the dominant real-world false-positive source.
claim:
## The core idea — "the stain model"
| `verified` | claimed + diff/command backs it up |
| `partial` | touched, but only scaffolding (stub/comment, no real logic) |
| `phantom` | claimed, but zero matching tool call — never happened |
| `unverifiable` | too hedged to check |
